title: Shawarma al-Helween
description: make your totem look like Shawarma al-Helween1
body:
Shawarma al-Helween is a fun and meme-style resourcepack that replaces the default Totem of Undying texture in Minecraft with a hilarious, exaggerated face inspired by Arabic meme culture.
It’s made purely for entertainment — combining humor, creativity, and modern meme vibes to bring laughter to your gameplay moments
